name: web
//scripts: Wires this app into the project-root justfile's standard targets (dev/build/lint/typecheck/test) — `pnpm -r --if-present` fans out to these. `dev`/`build`/`start` are Next's own CLI (Turbopack by default in Next 16); `typecheck` is a pure tsc pass (Next's build does its own internal type-checking too, but this keeps the workspace-standard target). `test` is a stub script — vitest itself + its config land with sub-agent D (see templates/frontend/vite-spa for the pattern this will mirror).
